73767.subject: ✨ May in Momentum: World Premieres, Progress & Regions
73767.body:
THE NEWSLETTER 

Автор: Volkswagen Group


Автор: Volkswagen Group

    
    
    Прочитайте цю статтю на LinkedIn, щоб приєднатися до обговорення
Прочитати на LinkedIn
https://www.linkedin.com/comm/pulse/may-momentum-world-premieres-progress-regions-volkswagen-group-hhlof?lipi=urn%3Ali%3Apage%3Aemail_email_series_follow_newsletter_02%3BD03zZq7yT8e21sK5ObUdIQ%3D%3D&midToken=AQFTjFOONAfT2w&midSig=1uXK82HVx1Icg1&trk=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_&trkEmail=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_-null-fz96fz~mpqnx7va~8q-null-null&eid=fz96fz-mpqnx7va-8q
  
Welcome to our May newsletter! This month showcased strong momentum across the Volkswagen Group – from iconic motorsport moments and major product premieres to progress in autonomous mobility, electrification and global impact initiatives. From the Nürburgring 24h and the world premiere of the all-new ID. Polo GTI and Škoda Epiq to new partnerships, expanding electric portfolios and real-world applications of autonomous driving, May highlights how innovation is being brought to life across our brands and markets. At the same time, our #REGIONS and #FACESOFVOLKSWAGENGROUP series continue to spotlight the people and initiatives driving meaningful change worldwide – reflecting the diversity, responsibility and ambition across the Group. 🔍 Explore the 8️⃣ highlights that shaped this month: 🎉 1. World Premiere: Škoda Epiq With the world premiere of the Škoda Epiq, the brand introduces its new electric entry model, bringing accessible e-mobility to the urban segment. As part of the Electric Urban Car Family, the Epiq expands Škoda’s EV lineup and builds on the success of Enyaq and Elroq. Key highlights include the new Modern Solid design language, a distinctive T-shaped light signature, bidirectional charging and sustainable interior materials. 💬 Klaus Zellmer, CEO of Škoda Auto: “The Epiq is our most approachable step into electric mobility – compact, confident, unmistakably Škoda, and designed to deliver exceptional value for money. It sets a clear benchmark for what an entry-level electric model should be: clean, purposeful design, intuitive user experience, and genuine everyday value.” 🚘 2. World Premiere: The all-new electric ID. Polo GTI The all-new ID. Polo GTI marks the first fully electric model in the 50-year GTI success story. With 166 kW (226 PS), it accelerates from 0 to 100 km/h in 6.8 seconds. Like the first GTI from 1976, power is delivered to the front wheels – with up to 290 Nm available instantly. 🚗 3. Nürburgring 24h: Emotion and Innovation With more than 350,000 fans on site, the Nürburgring 24h once again confirmed its status as one of the world’s most iconic motorsport events. A special highlight this year: 50 years of GTI, celebrated with fans in a dedicated GTI Village right next to the track. The Volkswagen Group showed a strong presence with 86 cars on the grid, including 60 entries from Porsche, the mos

73755.subject: $1.1B Stolen in DeFi. Institutions Still Want In
73755.body:
**gm, Defiers!**

These were our top news today:

* **[Crypto](https://thedefiant.io/news/markets/crypto-liquidations-near-1-billion-24-hours-g13uhz)**[ liquidations near $1B in 24 hours as leverage unwinds](https://thedefiant.io/news/markets/crypto-liquidations-near-1-billion-24-hours-g13uhz)

* **[Base](https://thedefiant.io/news/blockchains/base-launches-azul-upgrade-takes-step-toward-stage-2-decentralization)**[ hits Stage 2 with multiproofs, 99% fewer empty blocks](https://thedefiant.io/news/blockchains/base-launches-azul-upgrade-takes-step-toward-stage-2-decentralization)

* **[Vitalik](https://thedefiant.io/news/people/vitalik-buterin-endorses-interfold-privacy-protocol-voting-auctions-m4ldfh)**[ endorses Interfold, ZK+FHE privacy stack for voting and auctions](https://thedefiant.io/news/people/vitalik-buterin-endorses-interfold-privacy-protocol-voting-auctions-m4ldfh)

* **[Tempo L1](https://thedefiant.io/news/blockchains/tempo-l1-hits-3-9m-transactions-in-two-months)**[ hits 3.9M transactions in two months, $25M+ stablecoin supply](https://thedefiant.io/news/blockchains/tempo-l1-hits-3-9m-transactions-in-two-months)

It was a bit of a slow news day, but the standout for me was the [livestream discussion](https://x.com/i/broadcasts/1jxXggbEnMyJZ) we held on @DefiantNews X this morning: Are Institutions still coming to DeFi after the latest string of hacks?

As we [reported yesterday](https://thedefiant.io/news/hacks/openzeppelin-pushes-back-after-ex-cto-declares-all-of-defi-unsafe), Manuel Araoz, the co-founder of OpenZeppelin, the security shop which reviewed Aave, Compound, and Maker, posted that he now considers **"all of DeFi unsafe,"** arguing that AI coding agents have turned vulnerability-hunting into a game defenders structurally can't win. The backdrop is ugly: **roughly $630M drained across 27 exploits in April alone, $1.1B over twelve months, KelpDAO down $292M to Lazarus, Drift down $285M.**

So I sat down with John Zettler of Kraken, Sun Raghupathi of Veda, and Anthony DeMartino of Sentora, three people whose entire business is convincing institutions to route capital into this stuff, and asked: Are your phones ringing with panic, or worse, is it just crickets?

**The opposite, it turns out.**

"My phone has been blowing up since our launch," Zettler said of Kraken's new Bitcoin vault, which crossed $60M in TVL within a day. Sentora's DeMartino said his firm "landed three deals in the last five weeks," during the worst stretch of hacks, when he'd expected a pullback. **"The conversations have heated up, not slowed down since the incidents in April. The coincidence is hard to explain."**

Here's my attempt to explain it: **The hacks aren't deterring institutions because they changed what kind of risk DeFi is.**

As Sun put it, **"risk is now moving from the smart contract layer into the operational layer."** Almost none of the recent disasters were broken math in a contract. They were compromised keys,
